description: EFA hybrid actuation: v = -kappa*grad_a(E) + w. One scalar potential E(s,a,t) actuates (descend) and verifies (E(.,1): low = valid); a small l2-penalized correction w closes the scalar-fit gap.
features: [cos(th1-g1), sin(th1-g1), om1, cos(th2-g2), sin(th2-g2), om2, sin(th1), sin(th2)] + [a1, a2, t]
inference: a=0; for k in 0..K { t=k/K; a += (-kappa*grad_a E(s,a,t) + w(s,a,t))/K }; K=2 recommended
gate: actuate>=95 && verify>=90, best-of-<=3 seeds (FVI seed variance disclosed)
